title: You will be saved

segments.text: The word is near you,
The word of faith;
It’s in your mouth and in your heart,
That if you confess with your mouth Jesus as Lord (Jesus is Lord!)
And believe in your heart that God has raised Him from the dead,
You will be saved! (You will be saved!)
You will be saved! (Yes, you will!)
Just call upon His name and you’ll be saved;
For whoever calls upon the name,
The name of the Lord,
For whoever calls His name shall be saved.
For with the heart there
Is believing,
And with the mouth there is confession.
There is no distinction between Jew and Greek, (You and me!)
For the same Lord is Lord of all and rich to all who call
Upon Him, call! (O Lord!)
O Lord Jesus! (O Lord Jesus!)
Just call upon His name and you’ll be saved.
For whoever calls upon the name,
The name of the Lord,
For whoever calls His name shall be saved.
